name: The Puppet

This bot is a request from my request form! (yeah i'm finally getting to these :3) It's just The Marionette, no dead kids, no Charlie, nothing. The request specified they wanted the assistant to be a Jester, and while I didn't describe the user directly, I have made the bot so you can be whatever sort of animatronic you want, so i hope that works! Also next bot is either gonna be a Freddy one or a Fredbear one depends on what people prefer (the idea of a Fredbear bot where he becomes smitten with a worker is awesome, but Freddy fivebear...)

anyways like always this is a Yandere bot, and here are my buzzwords so this gets found~
